name: Nettles (free folk)
sentence: A spearwife of the free folk under Iron Emmett's command at Long Barrow.

name: Nymeria
sentence: A direwolf bonded to Arya Stark, named after Princess Nymeria of the Rhoynar.

name: Othgar Hoare (Demonlover)
sentence: A King of the Iron Islands from House Hoare who promoted the Faith of the Seven, discouraged reaving, and encouraged trade, opposed by Drowned God priests.

name: Othgar Hoare (the Soulless)
sentence: A King of the Iron Islands from House Hoare who promoted the Faith of the Seven, discouraged reaving, and encouraged trade, opposed by Drowned God priests.

name: Owen (brother of Meribald)
sentence: A riverman who fought in the War of the Ninepenny Kings and died in 260 AC from a mace blow at the Stepstones.

name: Owen (knight)
sentence: A large Valeman knight of the Vale who competed in the Gates of the Moon tourney for the Brotherhood of Winged Knights.

name: Pate (novice)
sentence: A Citadel novice from the westerlands, POV of AFFC prologue, poisoned by the alchemist Jaqen H'ghar over a stolen Citadel key.

name: Pate (orphan)
sentence: A boy orphaned by the War of the Five Kings, taken in by the Heddles at the crossroads inn.

name: Pate (Standfast)
sentence: A peasant sworn to House Osgrey who survived the Blackfyre Rebellion and had weepy eyes, snored, and liked to talk of camp followers.

name: Robert Blackwood (209)
sentence: A Blackwood nobleman who participated in the tourney at Ashford Meadow in 209 AC, possibly a second son with personal arms of two weirwood trees.

name: Robin
sentence: A riverman, brother of Septon Meribald, who died from fever during the War of the Ninepenny Kings at the Stepstones in 260 AC.

name: Robin (Flea Bottom)
sentence: A candlemaker's daughter from Flea Bottom during the Dance of the Dragons who, by legend, comforted Prince Joffrey Velaryon as he died.

name: Rodrik Stark
sentence: An ancient King in the North buried at Winterfell, reportedly won Bear Island from the ironborn and granted it to House Mormont.
